# Syshin's AI Portfolio

> AI-powered portfolio assistant with RAG technology

## Site Information

- **Name**: Syshin's Portfolio
- **URL**: https://syshin0116.vercel.app
- **Type**: Interactive AI Portfolio Platform
- **Owner**: Syshin (신승연)
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/syshin0116
- **Contact**: Available through the portfolio website

## Description

This is a living portfolio platform featuring an AI chatbot assistant that can answer questions about Syshin's projects, technical expertise, and professional experience. The platform uses RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) technology to provide accurate, context-aware responses about the portfolio content.

## Key Features

- Interactive AI chatbot for portfolio Q&A
- Real-time project showcase
- Dynamic content management
- Google authentication
- Responsive design with dark/light mode
- Integration with Supabase and Vector databases

## Main Sections

### Home (/)
- AI chatbot interface
- Portfolio introduction
- Quick access to projects

### Projects (/projects)
- Timeline view of all projects
- Categorized by company and personal projects
- Filterable by technology stack and completion status

### Individual Project Pages (/projects/[id])
- Detailed project information
- Technical stack breakdown
- Key achievements and metrics
- Challenges and learnings
- Architecture evolution (for major projects)

## Featured Projects

### Current Projects (In Progress)

1. **AppHub - Living Portfolio Platform**
   - Tech: Next.js 15, React 19, RAG, Vector DB
   - Focus: Integrated project management platform
   - URL: /projects/apphub

2. **SK PharmaAIX MR Assistant**
   - Tech: LangGraph, FastAPI, Azure, Qdrant
   - Focus: Pharmaceutical sales AI chatbot with RAG
   - URL: /projects/sk-pharmaaix

3. **KATECH AI Agent**
   - Tech: Next.js, FastAPI, LangGraph, Qdrant
   - Focus: Automotive industry RAG-based report generation
   - URL: /projects/katech-ai-agent

### Completed Projects

1. **LangChain Open Tutorial Contribution**
   - Tech: LangChain, LangGraph, RAG
   - Contribution to 2,000+ commit open-source project
   - URL: /projects/langchain-tutorial

2. **Greentech Water Treatment AI**
   - Tech: LightGBM, PyTorch, Time Series Analysis
   - Focus: Water quality prediction and anomaly detection
   - URL: /projects/greentech

3. **PodlyBot - KakaoTalk LLM Chatbot**
   - Tech: JavaScript, LLM API, Notion API
   - Focus: Personal assistant and company LLM service integration
   - URL: /projects/podlybot

4. **Podly - AI Voice News Service**
   - Tech: RAG, TTS, Flutter, FastAPI
   - Focus: AI-powered personalized voice news
   - URL: /projects/podly

5. **Men-in-Black - Traffic Violation Detection**
   - Tech: YOLOv8, SORT, EasyOCR, ZoeDepth
   - Focus: Automated traffic violation detection from dashcam footage
   - URL: /projects/men-in-black

6. **PROP - Proposal Generation AI Agent**
   - Tech: Flask, Celery, OpenAI API
   - Focus: Automated proposal and document generation
   - URL: /projects/prop

## Technical Expertise

### AI/ML
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
- LangChain & LangGraph
- Multi-Agent Systems
- Vector Databases (Qdrant, ChromaDB)
- Computer Vision (YOLO, OCR)
- Time Series Forecasting

### Full Stack Development
- **Frontend**: React 19, Next.js 15, TypeScript, TailwindCSS
- **Backend**: FastAPI, Python, Node.js
- **Database**: PostgreSQL, Supabase, Vector DBs
- **Infrastructure**: Docker, Vercel, Azure, AWS
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth, Keycloak SSO

### Notable Achievements
- Led AI development for 350+ pharmaceutical MR users
- Achieved 83% response time improvement (3min → 30sec)
- Built 1-person full-stack systems from scratch
- Contributed to major open-source projects
- Managed teams across multiple organizations

## Technologies Used in This Portfolio

- **Frontend**: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript
- **Styling**: TailwindCSS, Radix UI
- **Backend**: FastAPI (separate AI backend)
- **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL), Qdrant (Vector DB)
- **AI**: LangChain, RAG, OpenAI API
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth (Google OAuth)
- **Analytics**: Vercel Analytics, Speed Insights
- **Deployment**: Vercel

## Navigation

- Home: https://syshin0116.vercel.app
- Projects: https://syshin0116.vercel.app/projects
- Sitemap: https://syshin0116.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://syshin0116.vercel.app/robots.txt

## Additional Resources

- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/syshin0116/portfolio-web
- Blog Posts: Accessible through the AI chatbot
- Project Details: Available on individual project pages

## AI Chatbot Capabilities

The portfolio includes an AI assistant that can:
- Answer questions about any project
- Explain technical implementations
- Discuss challenges and solutions
- Provide code examples and architecture details
- Share insights from blog posts and documentation

## Update Frequency

- Projects: Updated as new work is completed
- Content: Dynamic updates through RAG system
- Sitemap: Automatically regenerated on deployment

---

This portfolio represents a living, breathing showcase of technical work, continuously updated and enhanced with new projects and capabilities.
